title: Hysentials
description: Hysentials is a content-expansion & QOL mod for Hypixel. It offers a plethora of new features like the Action Library & Clubs for Housing, Custom Levelling with Cosmetic Rewards, Unique redesigns of menus and ranks, emojis, and so much more!
body:
![Open beta image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70113b21dc0f11446272bb488a42316a88251037.png) Hysentials is a content-expansion and QOL mod for Hypixel. It offers a plethora of new features like the Action Library & Clubs for Housing, Custom Levelling with Cosmetic Rewards, unique redesigns of menus and ranks, emojis, and much more! ## Features
Emeralds

Emeralds

Hysentials uses Emeralds as the main currency to purchase goods that the mod offers, such as cosmetics, quest re-rolls, premium features, and trading!

  • Obtaining Emeralds - Earn small amounts of emeralds by playing minigames on Hypixel, or purchase them from our online store.
  • Wardrobe Cosmetics - Open the cosmetics wardrobe by pressing the default hotkey "K" (this can be changed in the mod’s configuration settings via R-SHIFT).
Hysentials Leveling

Hysentials Leveling

This client-side leveling system rewards users with exclusive cosmetics and emeralds! Gain experience points (EXP) and unlock rewards while playing. Some ways to earn EXP include:

Obtaining HXP
  • Playtime - Earn 200-400 EXP per hour by simply playing on Hypixel while using Hysentials.
  • Minigame Wins - Gain EXP for each minigame win. Here’s the breakdown:
    • EXP per win
    Game Experience per Win
    Arcade 200-300 EXP
    Bedwars 250 EXP
    Blitz 250 EXP
    Build Battle 150 EXP
    Cops vs Crims 150 EXP
    Duels 75 EXP
    Mega Walls 250 EXP
    Murder Mystery 250 EXP
    Paintball 225 EXP
    Quakecraft 225 EXP
    Skywars 150 EXP
    Smash Heroes 225 EXP
    Speed UHC 250 EXP
    Turbo Cart Racers 225 EXP
    TNT Games 300 EXP
    UHC 500 EXP
    VampireZ 225 EXP
    Walls 375 EXP
    Warlords 250 EXP
Leveling Menu

Access the leveling menu by typing /hysentials level. Here, you can view your level, XP, and progress towards the next level.
